python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, json, sys
checks = [
    ['bun','run','verify:m062:s03','--','--json'],
    ['bun','run','verify:m062:s03','--','--json'],
    ['bun','run','verify:m062:s03','--','--scenario','large-pr-bounded','--json'],
]
start=time.time()
outputs=[]
for cmd in checks:
    p=subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    if p.returncode != 0:
        sys.stdout.write(p.stdout)
        sys.stderr.write(p.stderr)
        print(f'__EXIT_CODE__={p.returncode}')
        print(f'__DURATION_MS__={int((time.time()-start)*1000)}')
        raise SystemExit(0)
    outputs.append(json.loads(p.stdout))

def normalize(report):
    report = dict(report)
    report.pop('generated_at', None)
    return report

same = normalize(outputs[0]) == normalize(outputs[1])
print(json.dumps({
    'default_runs_match_ignoring_generated_at': same,
    'default_scenario_count': outputs[0]['scenario_count'],
    'single_scenario_id': outputs[2]['scenarios'][0]['scenarioId'],
    'single_status': outputs[2]['scenarios'][0]['statusCode'],
    'default_issue_count': len(outputs[0]['issues']),
}, indent=2))
print('__EXIT_CODE__=0')
print(f'__DURATION_MS__={int((time.time()-start)*1000)}')
PY
